verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel leitang tawh kisai-in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: A beina hita! Gam buppi a beina hita hi

Israel-te aw, tu-in na beina ding uh hong tungta a, note in ka hehna tu-in na thuakta ding uh hi. Na gamtatnasa uh tawh kizui-in thu kong khen ding a, na gamtatsiatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding hi
Note kong zah kei ding a, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatnasate uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi
Topa Pasian in a gen thu in: “Note' tungah haksatna khat khit khat a banbanin hong tung thuahthuah ding hi
A beina hong tungta hi. Note a man na hita uh hi
Israel gamsungah a teng note' beina ding hong tungta ding hi. Mualsang dawn citenga biakna munte-ah lungdamna om nawnloin buaina bek a omna ding hong naita hi
A sawtloin ka hehna thu na thuak ding uh a, na gamtatnasate uh hangin thu hong khenin, a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi

Note kong zah kei ding a, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatnasate uh hangin gim a hong pia ding ka hi hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna leh note tungah gim a hong piapa ka hihna na thei ding uh hi
“Siatna ding hun hong tungta hi. Na ngongtatna uh khang a, na kiphatsakna uh lian hi
Migilote' hauhna leh lungmuan'nate haksa loin beimang ding hi
A hun hong tungta a, a ni hong naita hi. Mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna hong tungta ding ahih manin sumlei sumzuak nasepnate a kiman'na om nawnlo hi
A neihsa a zuakkhiapa in a nuntak sungin a zuaksa van ngahkiklo ding hi. Mi khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung ahih manin a mawhna hangun kuamah nungtalo ding uh hi
“Amaute in gal peengkul tum uh a, a vekpi-un kiging uh hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna tungkim ding ahih manin galsim dingin kuamah kuankhia zolo ding hi
Khua pualamah galkidona om a, khuasungah cinatna leh gilkialna om hi. Gamlaka om khempeuh gasungah si ding uh a, khuasunga om khempeuh cina leh gilkialin si ding uh hi
Vakhu lau bangin mi pawlkhatte in mualtung tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin amau' mawhna hangin si veve ding uh hi
Mi khempeuh' khut zaw dakdakin, a khuk uh ling kelkel ding hi
Amaute in dahna limin puanhampi silh ding uh a, pumlin'gawp ding uh hi. A sam uh kimettolsak ding a, a mindai ding uh hi

Topa' hehna amau' tungah a tun' ni ciangin, a ngun a khamte un amaute suahtak theilo ahih manin, a ngun a khamte uh nin bangin kongzing lakah paai ding uh hi. A gilkial uh ciangin zong an bangin tuate ne theilo uh hi. Ngun leh khamte in mawhna sungah amaute tumpihzaw hi
Amaute in a kiphatsakpih uh kizepna a manphate, a muhdahhuai milim dingin a bawl uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute' hauhna pen amau mah in a kih dingin ka bawl hi
Amau' nate, gamdang mite ka sutsak ding a, a neihsa khempeuh uh migilote sutsakin, ka ninsak ding hi
Ka biakinn a kinitsak ciangin ka kho kei ding hi. Gutate in ka biakinn luhin ninsak ding uh hi
“Na khuttum uh zial un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamsungah mi kithahna dim a, khuasungah ngongtatna dim hi
Minam gilo pente hong paipihin na innte uh ka luahsak ding hi. Minam dangte in na biakna mun ngeite uh a nitsak ciangin mi thahat-a a kineite' kimuan'na beita ding hi
Lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin lungnopna na zong ding uh a, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi

Lungkhamna khat khit khat a banbanin na tuak ding uh a, thusia bekbek na zaza ding uh hi. Kamsangte kiangah thu na dong ding uh hi. Siampite in mite tungah hong hilh ding thu theilo ding uh a, upate in hong gen ding mel theilo ding uh hi

Kumpipa dahin thum ding a, ulian penpa a cihna ding theiloin omcipin, mi khempeuh lau-in ling ding uh hi. Na gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding a, midangte tungah thu na khen bangun note tungah thu kong khen ding hi. Hih bangin kong hih ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na thei ding uh hi,” cihna thu ahi hi.
